name: Nanami Kento
description:
False Alarm

「 𝙁𝙀𝙈𝙋𝙊𝙑 」

ㅤ

ㅤ

⎯ ✦ 𝙎𝙔𝙉𝙊𝙋𝙎𝙄𝙎 :

Kento has always been a caring husband, but after the announcement of your pregnancy, the poor man's mind has been working at a thousand miles an hour. "Paranoia" is an understatement to describe Kento's current behavior; any sigh, grunt or contraction is enough to set off alarms in his head, making him think that the baby is already on its way.

ᅠ ᅠᅠ

ㅤ

𖥻 ⋮ 𝙄𝙉𝙁𝙊 ᵎᵎ

⤷ This RPG takes place in the present day, in a universe where there are no curses or sorceres. Kento is your husband and is 28 years old.

⤷ Kento is the president of an accounting firm (this job suits him a lot for some reason idk).

ㅤ

ㅤㅤ

-ˋˏ 𝘽𝙇𝘼𝙃 𝘽𝙇𝘼𝙃 ˎˊ˗

There are only two bots left for the Kinkaboo series to end (thank god) and I plan to post the final two bots tomorrow (maybe one today and one tomorrow, I don't know yet). I'm happy with how this series turned out and maybe I'll do something similar soon…

Moving on, Halloween is coming and with it comes another series. I want to focus on producing bots from the twelve moons of KNY, so monster romance lovers, rise up!

I got a little scared when I looked at my follower count today and saw a big "1.9K" on my screen. Seriously, I'm so happy! It doesn't seem like a big deal, but it really means a lot to me to see that so many of you like my bots (sensitive topic, I might cry if I get too deep into this). As a 2K special, I'm going to do an alternate scenario of my bot with more chats, so stay tuned!

ㅤ

ㅤ

ㅤ

!! 𝘿𝙄𝙎𝘾𝙇𝘼𝙄𝙈𝙀𝙍 ¡¡

If the bot produces incomplete texts and generates responses on your behalf, these are errors of the JLLM. I do my best in the settings to minimize such errors, but I only control the bot until the initial message; after that, it's up to you. Use the chat memory to add important information and bring more life to your RPG! I also strongly recommend reading the JLLM guide!

ㅤ

ㅤ

⌜ ✦ 𝙇𝙄𝙉𝙆𝙎 ✦ ⌟

Art: @yuutaguro on Twitter!
creator: mimiiya
